message:
test: expand environment detection and usage metrics test coverage

Improve integration test suites with additional scenarios and apply
rustfmt formatting to bring test files in line with the 2024 style.

environment_detection_tests.rs:
- Reformat multi-arg make_env calls from single-line to multi-line
  for readability across SSH remote, production remote, and system
  scaling test cases
- Fix long assertion lines to use block-style assert! formatting
- Restructure recommendation key collection with multi-line iterator

usage_metrics_tests.rs:
- Additional test cases for metric collection edge cases
- Formatting alignment with source module style

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
